song.title: You Are So Good To Me
song.author: Don & Lori Chaffer, Ben & Robin Pasley
song.presentation: V1 C V2 C P C V3 C B
song.lyrics:
;Presentation: V1 C V2 C P C V3 C B
[V1] You are so good to me, You heal my broken heart, You are my Father in heaven.| You are so good to me, You heal my broken heart, You are my Father in heaven.
[C] You are beautiful, my sweet, sweet song. I will sing again.| You are beautiful, my sweet, sweet song. I will sing again.| You are beautiful, my sweet, sweet song. I will sing again.
[V2] You ride upon the clouds, You lead me to the truth, You are the Spirit inide me.
[P] You are my strong melody, You are my dancing rhythm You are my perfect rhyme, and I want to sing forever
[V3] You poured out all your blood, you died upon the cross, You are my Jesus who loves me
[B] You are my Father in heaven, you are the Spirit inside me, You are my Jesus who loves me
